{{Quote|Now I must leave for an important ''peace mission'' to the ''planet Armath!''<nowiki />|Ambassador Zell|<ref name="D3" />}}
'''Armath''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="D3" /> located in the [[Mikaster sector/Legends|Mikaster sector's]] [[Armath system/Legends|Armath system]],<ref name="EAOC" /> which was situated in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> In [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]],<ref name="Date">{{DroidsComicDate}}</ref> [[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] [[Zell]] of the planet [[Majoor]] went on an important [[peace mission to Armath]], accompanied by a convoy of [[Starship/Legends|starships]].<ref name="D3" />

==Behind the scenes==
Armath was first mentioned in the [[Droids (1986) 3|third issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Droids (1986)|''Star Wars: Droids'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]], which was written by [[David Manak]] and published by [[Marvel Comics]]<ref name="D3" /> on [[May 13]], [[1986]].<ref name="Release">{{BookCite|title=[[Marvel Age]]|number=[[W:c:marvel:Marvel Age Vol 1 40|Vol. 1 No. 40]]|publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] Group|date=[[July]] [[1986]]|issn=8750-4367}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book placed the Armath [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square N-15.<ref name="TEA" />
